body.title: Granny dispatch: workers self-register roles; route by capability at dispatch time
body.result: workers self-register roles via register_worker(roles=[...]); Granny matches by capability at dispatch time; 18 tests
body.description:
Granny's dispatch logic currently checks `worker` field directly. Change to: read `role` (falling back to `worker`-inferred role), then map role→available workers using a config-driven table. Role map (granny.yaml):
  apprentice: []
  builder: [dicksimnel]
  creator: [dicksimnel]  # elevated model via InferenceRequest task_class
  master: [claude]
  guru: [claude]  # CC + advisor pattern in sprint-ticket

For creator vs builder routing: InferenceRequest task_class='analyst' for creator, 'worker' for builder — same DS binary, different model tier.

**Affected files:** devices/granny/daemon.py (_ticket_needs_cc, cc0_dispatch_fn logic), devices/granny/device.py (route_ticket), config/granny.yaml (role_map section)
**Design rules:** external state principle; no-sqlite; config-driven not hardcoded
**Scope boundary:** dispatch routing only; does not change ticket schema (T-role-ladder-schema), does not change DS toolloop internals
**Completion criteria:** granny.yaml has role_map section; daemon reads it; builder tickets route to DS; master/guru tickets route to CC; creator tickets route to DS with analyst task_class; 6+ tests covering each role→worker path; existing dispatch tests still pass
